User.title: User
User.description: Unified document storing user auth, profile, and 180-day roadmap progression data

profile.description: The user's setup parameters, schedule preference, and start dates

roadmap.description: 180-day syllabus lessons list tracking completion and rescheduling metrics

commits.description: Logged GitHub commits with links and timestamps

resumeProjects.description: Portfolio capstones generated and flagged for resume compilation

weeklyReports.description: Cached reports or generated performance indicators

lastUpdate.description: UTC timestamp of the last user interaction

/users/{username}.description: User account and custom progress roadmap tracking store
